# version

**Instance Property**

The version number of the structure.

## Declaration

```swift
var version: Int32
```

## Discussion

The value is passed as a parameter to [doc://com.apple.mediatoolbox/documentation/MediaToolbox/MTAudioProcessingTapCreate(_:_:_:_:)]. It must be set to [doc://com.apple.mediatoolbox/documentation/MediaToolbox/kMTAudioProcessingTapCallbacksVersion_0].

## Fields

- **clientInfo**: App data that the system passes to the initialization callback.
- **init**: A callback to initialize the tap processor.
- **finalize**: A callback to perform any necessary cleanup.
- **prepare**: A callback to prepare the tap processor.
- **unprepare**: A callback to perform any necessary cleanup for previous preparation.
- **process**: A callback for processing the audio.
